# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'REGISTRY_URL',
            choices: ['docker.io', 'registry.example.com', 'localhost:5000'],
            description: 'Choose the registry to push the image to'
        )
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_TAG',
            defaultValue: 'latest',
            description: 'Image tag to build and push'
        )
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'myapp',
            description: 'Name of the Docker image'
        )
    }
    stages {
        stage('Build and Push') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def imageName = "${REGISTRY_URL}/${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}"
                    sh "docker build -t ${imageName} ."
                    sh "docker push ${imageName}"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
